This interface allows you to interactively explore and query your codebase using natural language commands. It's designed to be user-friendly and provide quick insights into your project structure and contents.

This tool is incredibly powerful and can be used for various tasks such as code navigation, search, analysis, documentation review, and more. It's designed to help developers efficiently explore large codebases and understand the structure and functionality of their projects.
